name: SomeIpGetProvidedObjectHandle
title: SomeIpGetProvidedObjectHandle
description: Enables to search for a provided object which has been created separately.

parameters.name: objectSymbolicQualifier
parameters.description: Symbolic qualifier identifying uniquely a FIBEX 4.1 database object. For syntax see Symbolic Database Access by SOME/IP.

return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the SomeIpGetLastError function.
